summary: This document is a pitch deck for KeepMeCompany, an AI-powered phone agent startup addressing senior loneliness. It outlines the problem of healthcare costs due to isolation, the product solution, market size across 9 countries, and the subscription business model. The deck concludes with team backgrounds and specific financial targets for fundraising.
